definition: Plastic bags plastic films and other soft sheet-like floating waste
annotation_note: Annotated when the object is visible on the water surface

definition: Wood branches sticks and other wood-like floating objects
annotation_note: Annotated when the object is regarded as floating garbage

definition: Foam blocks foam sheets and other foam-like floating waste
annotation_note: Annotated when the foam object has a clear visible boundary

definition: Plastic bottles glass bottles metal cans and similar container-like waste
annotation_note: Annotated when the container-like object is visible on the water surface

definition: Dead fish floating on or near the water surface
annotation_note: Annotated when the dead fish body is visually identifiable
